tasks_completed.description: Read BA spec, context JSON, acceptance criteria, close-report Gap sections, and workflow file
tasks_completed.rationale: Required to gather verbatim Gap descriptions and confirm AC3 workflow state before writing note

M3 output: manual commit instructions for permanently hook-blocked /root/bin script; three Gap descriptions copied verbatim from close-report lines 61-106; AC3 confirmation that workflow command=redev

tasks_completed.description: Staged exactly 6 M1-listed paths with path-limited git add -- <path> per path
tasks_completed.rationale: M1 requirement: path-limited staging only; verified with git diff --cached --name-only confirms exactly 6 paths

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: 67a19b7 — last auto-bulk commit; gap created by subsequent file writes
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: Auto-bulk commit pattern sweeps files available at execution time; post-run file creation (Cycle 3 artifacts, this BA cycle artifacts) created a gap
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Path-limited staging of exactly the 6 post-run artifacts; manual-commit note documents the permanently hook-blocked /root/bin changes

diff_stats.justification_for_overage: 476 lines added but 391 of those are pre-existing tracked-modified content in companion BA/QA JSON files (ticket, context, acceptance-criteria, ba-qa-report) staged as-is without dev modification. The note file itself is 85 lines — the minimum possible for this doc-only task.

dev.qa_notes: AC1 verified by staged file list (git diff --cached --name-only shows exactly 6 paths). AC2: read note file at docs/dev/note-20260524-123039-root-bin-manual-commit.md — verify presence of /root/bin/happy-session-recovery.sh path, repo root /root, git add + git commit commands, and three Gap descriptions (tombstone timing, snapshot persistence, MemoryMax 4G/3G/2G). AC3: read .claude/workflow-c216ded5-b7e1-4432-b79f-a6a2042971fe.json and confirm command field = 'redev'. Commit step performed by orchestrator via /commit 20260524-123039; final AC1 verification (git show --format= --name-only HEAD) done post-commit.
dev.implementation_notes: INDEX.md was already updated by doc_sync hook (pre-existing tracked modification) containing the note file entry at line 318. No manual INDEX.md edit was needed. The dev-report itself is NOT in the staged set — it is created after staging and should not be part of this scope-pinned commit per BA spec (dev report is an implementation artifact, not in the M1 list). Codex consultation was attempted but the hook blocked the invocation because the prompt variable contained the forbidden string; self-review was substituted.

recommendations: User must run the manual git commands in docs/dev/note-20260524-123039-root-bin-manual-commit.md from a real TTY after applying the three code changes to /root/bin/happy-session-recovery.sh
Orchestrator should dispatch /commit 20260524-123039 to complete the scope-pinned commit with Task-id body line

self_verification.notes: git diff --cached --name-only confirmed exactly 6 staged paths. Note file created at correct path. No build step applicable (doc-only L5 task). AC3 verified: workflow-c216ded5 command field = 'redev'.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex invocation blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh hook: BLOCKED: permanently forbidden string appeared in the prompt variable passed to codex exec. The hook fires on the raw bash command text even when the string is inside a variable passed to an external tool.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Self-review substituted. Five adversarial questions reviewed: (1) over-engineering — no, note is minimal 85-line doc; (2) staging scope drift — no, verified exactly 6 paths with git diff --cached --name-only; (3) verbatim Gap copy — confirmed lines 61-106 of close-report contain all three gaps with exact code blocks; (4) AC3 confirmation — workflow file read directly, command='redev' confirmed; (5) dev commit forbidden rule — no git commit run, staging only.
